description_long: This chaise features a solid, monolithic structure with a high, gently arched backrest and broad, squared armrests on both sides. The backrest is the most prominent feature, rising above the armrests in a smooth, continuous curve. The rear of the chaise is plain, while the front side displays a recessed rectangular panel, adding a subtle decorative element. The seat appears wide and deep, designed for comfortable lounging, though no separate cushions or upholstery details are visible. The entire object has a uniform, matte gray finish, suggesting it is constructed from a single material, likely concrete or stone. The base is flat and extends the full width of the chaise, with no visible legs or feet.
description: A solid, arched-back chaise with broad armrests and a recessed front panel, finished in matte gray. The design is monolithic and minimal, with no visible cushions or upholstery details.
description_view_0: The back view shows the high, smoothly curved backrest and the squared armrests, with a plain, unadorned surface.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the chaise's thick, blocky profile and the continuous curve of the backrest.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the recessed rectangular panel beneath the seat and the symmetrical armrests flanking the wide seating area.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same solid, block-like profile and the arch of the backrest.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently arched, rising above the armrests in a smooth, continuous curve. It is solid and unsegmented, with no visible decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, broad and squared, integrated into the main body of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: No distinct legs are visible; the chaise has a solid, block-like base that extends the full width, giving it a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no visible upholstery or fabric pattern; the surface is smooth and solid, with a matte finish.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No separate cushions are visible; the seat and backrest appear to be a single, continuous solid form without any attached or loose cushions.
